hero.title: ਹਰ ਸਕਿੰਟ ਮਾਇਨੇ ਰੱਖਦਾ ਹੈ।
hero.subtitle: BloodBridge AI ਥੈਲੇਸੀਮੀਆ ਮਰੀਜ਼ਾਂ ਨੂੰ ਪੂਰੇ ਭਾਰਤ ਵਿੱਚ ਅਨੁਕੂਲ ਖੂਨਦਾਤਾਵਾਂ ਨਾਲ ਜੋੜਦਾ ਹੈ।

finder.title: ਆਪਣਾ ਮੇਲ ਲੱਭੋ
finder.result_desc: ਤੁਹਾਡੇ ਖੇਤਰ ਵਿੱਚ ਦਾਨੀ ਤਿਆਰ ਹਨ। ਅਨੁਮਾਨਿਤ ਸਮਾਂ:
finder.subtitle: ਦੇਖੋ ਅਸੀਂ ਕਿੰਨੀ ਜਲਦੀ ਦਾਨੀ ਲੱਭ ਸਕਦੇ ਹਾਂ

donor.title: ਜੀਵਨ ਰੇਖਾ ਬਣੋ
donor.success: ਧੰਨਵਾਦ! ਤੁਸੀਂ ਹੁਣ BloodBridge ਨੈੱਟਵਰਕ ਦਾ ਹਿੱਸਾ ਹੋ।

pulse.title: Blood Pulse — Live Network
pulse.subtitle: Watch our AI-powered donor network pulse across India in real time

how.title: How the Pulse Works
how.subtitle: Our AI acts the moment a patient needs blood.
how.step1_desc: Hospital submits request with blood type, location and urgency.
how.step2_desc: Engine ranks donors by compatibility, proximity and response rate.
how.step3_desc: Top donors notified first. Expands if no response in 10 mins.
how.step4_desc: Donor confirms with one tap. Coordinator tracks on dashboard.

about.title: About Blood Warriors
about.subtitle: A foundation built on hope, compassion, and technology.
about.body: Blood Warriors Foundation is a registered NGO founded in 2020, headquartered in Hyderabad. Our mission is to create a Thalassemia-Free India by 2035.
about.vision: A future where every child is born free of Thalassemia.
about.mission: Empowering communities to support Thalassemia patients through AI, awareness, and action.
about.founded: Established in 2020 in Hyderabad with a mission to make India Thalassemia-free by 2035.
about.condition_desc: Thalassemia is an inherited blood disorder causing severe anaemia.
about.treatment_desc: Patients need blood transfusions every 15-20 days for their entire life.
about.prevention_desc: Genetic testing before marriage can prevent Thalassemia.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Whether you want to donate, partner, or just learn more — we're here.
